query: SELECT CONCAT('items=', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orderItems oi INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.orderNumber LIKE '9901%')) as info
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT CONCAT('items=', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orderItems oi INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.orderNumber LIKE '9901%')) as info
